special_mechanics.name: Death Match Mode
special_mechanics.description: Arena-based mode with environmental hazards that can damage characters or change battle conditions

physics_values.notes: Mode removed in later sequels (World Heroes 2 Jet and Perfect)

special_mechanics.name: Attack Strength Levels
special_mechanics.description: Button hold mechanic for punch/kick intensity similar to original Street Fighter

physics_values.mechanic: hold button longer for stronger attacks

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/qualitative data only. This is a fighting game ported from Neo Geo to SNES in 1993. Sources provide gameplay mechanics and regional differences but contain no documented movement physics, gravity, jump, or sub-pixel system parameters. Fighting game genre typically focuses on attack/defense mechanics rather than platforming physics. No technical movement data available in provided sources.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - World Heroes (SNES)
